productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Women Printed Lavender T-shirt
description: Composition Lavender round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Bring out the trendy fashionista side of you with this lavender graphic tee from urban yoga.
